_doc: Underlying-token deny-list interfaces, read by test/BaseForkTest.t.sol (_underlyingDenyListInterface). Only `getter` (the bool-returning view selector) is consumed; `token`/`name` identify the entry. Known-denied test vectors live in config/blacklist-seeds.json; the deny-list storage itself is read from the live mainnet fork, so no membership scanning is configured here. Adding a blacklist-bearing token is a one-entry edit.
